steps.title: Identify the contrast signal
steps.content: The word “instead” sets up a contrast: most studies focus on people who live above sea level, but these researchers chose to study people below sea level. The passage emphasizes they took a path different from standard practice.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: ”Innovative” means new and unconventional—exactly right for researchers who chose to pursue their study in an opposite direction from standard practice (below sea level instead of above). Predictable, timeworn, and idealistic either suggest routine practice or focus on something other than methodology. That matches choice C — C is correct.
